name: 2'x3' Striped Accent Rug Olive Green - Threshold™
description:
Bring comfort and style to any room in your house with this Striped Accent Rug from Threshold™. This woven accent rug features a striped pattern in an olive green hue for cool style and versatility. The rectangular area rug also features a flat-pile construction, making it perfect for high-traffic areas like your living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
